signals.reasoning: Cover the live TON short now. It has only retained 3% of peak P&L, warning level is urgent, and the short no longer has enough edge to justify defending it.
BTC is already in a liquidation flush, so I would not chase a fresh short after the first dump leg.
ETH is also already flushing and no longer offers a clean fresh edge in either direction right here.
SOL remains a reduced-size short lean because price is down while open interest is still rising, which suggests fresh shorts are still pressing.
ZEREBRO is already deep into a flush and too illiquid to trust for a fresh short chase.
SPX still leans short because the dump is confirmed and the tape remains weak, but the edge is already late and reduced by the active veto.
VVV has already broken lower on the day, so I would rather wait than force a fresh short here.
FARTCOIN still looks shortable on a reduced-size basis because it is holding up too well after the broader dump and still reads as a short-covering rally.
PENGU is weak but not showing enough structure or crowding to justify a fresh directional trade.
VIRTUAL has some squeeze fuel from negative funding, but after this dump I would rather wait for a cleaner reset before taking either side.
PUMP remains a reduced-size short lean because it is down while funding is still positive, but the edge is only modest after the first flush.
LIT leans short because price is slipping while open interest is still rising, which suggests fresh shorts are pressing into a weak tape.
AERO is also a modest short lean because price is down while open interest is still building, which is consistent with a bearish continuation setup.
BRETT is too low-liquidity to trust for a serious fresh position.
GOAT is too low-liquidity and too weakly signaled to justify a fresh trade.
NOT has squeeze fuel from negative funding, but the market regime and poor liquidity argue for patience instead of forcing a long.
STBL remains one of the cleaner fades because price is still green while funding is extremely positive, which leaves the long side crowded.
GRIFFAIN is already in a flush state and too low-liquidity to trust for a fresh short chase.
WLD is still too resilient to call a clean short and not attractive enough to buy in this macro tape.
MANTA is too low-liquidity and too mixed structurally to justify a fresh position.
